description: simulate_shot returns [range, peak_height, hang_time]: x at landing, the max y, and the accumulated time
best_angle loops over angles, simulates each, and keeps the one with the largest range (a 'best so far' search)
best_angle and range_lost_to_air call simulate_shot rather than re-deriving the loop
range_lost_to_air subtracts the simulated range from the vacuum formula
